title: psidium rhombeum
intro: Psidium rhombeum is a species of flowering plant in the myrtle family, commonly known as a type of guava. The leaves and fruits of Psidium rhombeum have been traditionally used in folk medicine due to their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Psidium rhombeum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing antimicrobial protection against infections. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves and fruits are also used in herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures.
